title: dactylorhiza × erdingeri f. elongata
intro: Dactylorhiza × erdingeri f. elongata is a hybrid orchid species, resulting from the cross between Dactylorhiza incarnata and Dactylorhiza maculata. Traditionally, this plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include its potential to reduce inflammation and promote wound healing due to its high content of flavonoids and phenolic acids. The health benefits of Dactylorhiza × erdingeri f. elongata include its ability to support cardiovascular health, improve blood circulation, and exhibit antioxidant properties. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
